---
title: "British Pride - Reweighting"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-22"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}


country_avg_poll <- read.csv(here("output", "country_avg_british_pride_2.csv"))


aux <- read.csv("https://mrp-psf.ams3.digitaloceanspaces.com/other-files/const_data_full_new.csv")
aux <- aux %>% mutate(const_name = gsub("Ynys Mon", "Ynys Môn", const_name))


aux <- aux %>%
  mutate(
    region_2 = case_when(
      region_name %in% c(
        "East Midlands", "East of England", "Greater London",
        "North East England", "North West England", "South East England",
        "South West England", "West Midlands", "Yorkshire and the Humber",
        "London", "England"
      ) ~ "England",
      region_name == "Scotland" ~ "Scotland",
      region_name == "Wales"    ~ "Wales",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Load constituency-level MRP predictions
preds_pride <- read.csv(here("output", "brit_pride_constituency_summary.csv"))


preds_pride <- preds_pride %>%
  left_join(aux %>% select(const_name, region_2), by = "const_name") %>%
  mutate(
    region_2 = case_when(
      const_name == "Ynys MÃ´n" ~ "Wales",
      TRUE                      ~ region_2
    )
  )


preds_pride <- preds_pride %>%
  rename(net_score_preds = net_score)

# Join poll country averages onto predictions
preds_pride <- preds_pride %>%
  left_join(
    country_avg_poll %>% select(country, net_score_poll_cntry_avg),
    by = c("region_2" = "country")
  )

# Compute MRP average net score per country
preds_pride <- preds_pride %>%
  group_by(region_2) %>%
  mutate(mrp_average = mean(net_score_preds)) %>%
  ungroup()



# multiplier and reweighted  net score
preds_pride <- preds_pride %>%
  mutate(
    mult = net_score_poll_cntry_avg / mrp_average,   # region-level scaling factor
    pride_net_reweighted = net_score_preds * mult          # rescale each constituency MRP
  )


# Additive adjustment: shift each constituency by the gap between
# the poll country average and the MRP country average
preds_pride_additive <- preds_pride %>%
  mutate(
    adjustment           = net_score_poll_cntry_avg - mrp_average,
    net_score_reweighted = net_score_preds + adjustment
  )



# Output reweighted scores
preds_pride_reweighted <- preds_pride %>%
  select(const_name, pride_net_reweighted)

write.csv(preds_pride_reweighted, here("output", "preds_british_pride_reweighted.csv"), row.names = FALSE)




preds_pride_additive_small <- preds_pride_additive %>% 
  select(const_name, net_score_reweighted)



write.csv(preds_pride_additive_small, here("output", "preds_pride_additive_small.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```
